attacking_style: Does not attack for stage wins; enters breakaways specifically to contest intermediate sprints for bonus seconds. Tactical, opportunistic moves rather than competitive attacks.
team_tactics: Sky/Team deploys him as experienced domestique in breakaways with clear bonus-hunting mandate. Sacrifices stage ambitions to harvest marginal GC time gains for team leaders through intermediate sprints.
terrain_preference: Suited to flat-to-rolling stages where breakaways can survive to intermediate sprints but will likely be caught. Not a climber or stage hunter; diesel engine for tempo work.
vulnerability: Not competitive in actual stage finishes or selective terrain. Value limited to bonus second collection and break representation rather than winning capability.
key_patterns: Consistently targets intermediate sprint bonuses from breakaways across multiple races (3 observations).
Used as tactical domestique for marginal GC gains, not stage hunting (3 observations).
Team willing to spend his energy on creative bonus-second strategies (2 observations).
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently executing same tactical role across season; performance stable but role unchanged from June to October 2018
